blockingIssues.description: Persisted/disconnected Work chat sessions can lose their `awaitingInput` summary signal because `summarizeSessionRow()` only derives it from live in-memory pending-input state in `apps/desktop/src/main/services/chat/agentChatService.ts`.
The Work root Activity feed is built from unfiltered merged sessions in `apps/ios/ADE/Views/Work/WorkRootScreen.swift`, so lane/search/status filters do not fully constrain what the root shows.
The new Work session-detail `Open lane` action only switches to the Lanes tab without consuming the requested lane navigation, so it does not open the related lane as promised.
Work file-reference navigation can silently fall back to `workspaces.first` when the session lane workspace is missing, routing to the wrong Files workspace instead of surfacing an explicit error.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update `sync-parity-worker` to stop prescribing `npm --prefix apps/desktop run test -- --maxWorkers=7` and instead use the repo's supported targeted Vitest patterns or other documented commands.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `work-sync-contract-parity` review found `.factory/skills/sync-parity-worker/SKILL.md` still recommends `--maxWorkers=7`, while `.factory/library/work-sync-validation.md` documents that this repo's Vitest CLI rejects that flag. The reviewed worker handoff also recorded the mismatch as a procedure deviation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update `ios-worker` verification guidance to align with this mission's targeted `xcodebuild test -only-testing:...` policy instead of prescribing the full suite for every feature.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `work-mobile-session-detail-and-linked-actions` review found `.factory/skills/ios-worker/SKILL.md` still prescribes full `xcodebuild test`, while the mission `AGENTS.md` and the feature instructions require targeted `-only-testing:` validation for Work changes. The worker handoff called out that mismatch explicitly.
